title: Mid term reporting - track and monitor steps
excerpt: I oversee programs and for midterm reporting involves tracking if report templates have gone out for workplan and budgets.  Track returned and completed documents.  Involves staff notify supervisor and finance to review …

posts.author: Stephanie3 (Stephanie)
posts.cookedHtml: I oversee programs and for midterm reporting involves tracking if report templates have gone out for workplan and budgets. Track returned and completed documents. Involves staff notify supervisor and finance to review the reports. Once approved than Finance release and distribution of funds. As supervisor how to track all these steps? There are 80 files with same process.
